meta.title: Tech Mastery Program | Computing and AI training

hero.title: Tech Mastery Program
hero.subtitle: A progressive training program designed to build strong foundations in logic, programming, system modeling, and practical AI usage, ending with a mini project and a final Demo Day.
hero.visualTitle: From structured thinking to useful product building.

program.title: A curriculum built as a real progression curve.
program.subtitle: Each month deepens a key capability before moving to the next one: think, build, then orchestrate with AI.

months.title: Tech Mastery Program
months.subtitle: Build the logical habits needed to understand and solve problems clearly.

months.title: Build Like an Engineer
months.subtitle: Move from isolated scripts to a structured way of modeling real systems.

weeks.title: Modeling
topics: Transform a real problem into objects

months.title: Lead the AI Revolution
months.subtitle: Learn how to use AI as a productivity lever and as a way to solve local problems.

weeks.title: Business applications
topics: Solving real problems in Cote d'Ivoire

skills.title: What participants will be able to do.
skills.subtitle: The program targets capabilities that can be reused directly in local, entrepreneurial, and professional contexts.

schedule.title: A weekly rhythm built for consistency.
schedule.subtitle: The program runs every week with one online session and one in-person session.

cta.title: Move to the selection survey.
cta.subtitle: The questionnaire evaluates motivation, logic, and commitment. Answer carefully and honestly.

feedback.required: Please complete all required questions in this step.
feedback.hours: Weekly hours must be greater than or equal to 1.

feedback.phone: Please enter a valid phone number.

actualGrade.label: Current grade / class / diploma

whyProgramming.label: 1. Why do you want to learn programming? (3-5 lines)
whyProgramming.placeholder: Explain your motivation in a few lines...

whatBuild.label: 2. What do you want to build after this training?
whatBuild.placeholder: Example: an app to support local associations...

techTried.label: 3. What have you already tried learning in tech?

hoursPerWeek.label: 4. How many hours per week can you dedicate to this training?

difficultThing.label: 5. Give an example of something difficult you managed to finish.

biggestNumberMethod.label: 6. How would you find the largest number in a list? (without code)

teaSteps.label: 7. Explain how to prepare tea step by step.

firstWhenBroken.label: 8. If something does not work, what do you do first?
firstWhenBroken.placeholder: What is your first troubleshooting action?

whatCouldStop.label: 9. What could make you stop this training?

whyChooseYou.label: 10. Why should we choose you over others?

howHeardAbout.label: 11. How did you hear about the Tech Mastery Program?
